title: EVgo Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text: Based on the latest analyst research, EVgo has a consensus recommendation of Buy from 16 analysts. The average recommendation includes 0 strong sells, 0 sells, 3 holds, 10 buys, and 3 strong buys. The consensus price target for EVgo is $4.99 based on ratings from 16 analysts. The average stock forecast for EVgo is $6.68 USD, corresponding to an upside of 116.03% from current prices. The range of stock forecasts spans from $4.04 to $12.60 USD. EVgo is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 12.6% and 24.7% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 18.2% per annum. Next quarter's sales forecast for EVgo is $85.99 million with a range of $77.40 million to $109.86 million. Next quarter's earnings estimate for EVgo is -$0.13 with a range of -$0.24 to -$0.08. Recent analyst activity shows: Evercore ISI lowered its price target to $3.50 from $4 while maintaining an Outperform rating. UBS analyst Jon Windham lowered the price target to $5.50 from $5.90 while maintaining a Buy rating.
